text.content: Executive Summary

rich_text.plain_text: Executive Summary

text.content: User requested comprehensive analysis for selling 5-room apartment in Divonne-les-Bains, including property valuation, agency identification, and international organization contacts. Manus conducted extensive market research, identified 8 real estate agencies and 13 international organizations, and created a professional website with interactive features. The final website required multiple iterations to fix iOS compatibility issues and achieve full functionality with proper visual design.

markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

User requested comprehensive analysis for selling 5-room apartment in Divonne-les-Bains, including property valuation, agency identification, and international organization contacts. Manus conducted extensive market research, identified 8 real estate agencies and 13 international organizations, and created a professional website with interactive features. The final website required multiple iterations to fix iOS compatibility issues and achieve full functionality with proper visual design.


## Context & Intent

User needs to sell a 111m² apartment in Divonne-les-Bains with specific requirements for estimation, agency identification, and maximizing visibility to Swiss and international clientele while minimizing direct involvement in viewings.


## What Was Done

Comprehensive property analysis, market research across France and Switzerland, identification of real estate agencies and international organizations, creation and deployment of professional website with interactive databases, multiple iterations to fix iOS compatibility and visual issues.


## Outputs Produced

- [property_analysis] Property Valuation Report — Complete analysis of 111m² apartment with market comparison and pricing strategy
- [database] Real Estate Agencies Database — 8 agencies with contact details, specializations, and priority rankings
- [database] International Organizations Database — 13 organizations with 150K+ potential employees
- [website] Professional Real Estate Website — Full-featured website with interactive databases, exports, and mobile optimization
- [action_plan] 3-Phase Sales Strategy — Prioritized approach with timelines and specific contacts

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Property pricing at €400k (61% below market average)
- Target Swiss and international clientele for premium pricing
- Deploy website for professional presentation and easy sharing
- Prioritize CAGI, BARNES Suisse, and GEM for immediate action

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Comprehensive market research provided strong competitive advantage
- Website deployment created professional presentation tool
- Interactive databases improved data accessibility
Failed / suboptimal:

- Initial website had iOS compatibility issues
- Multiple deployment iterations needed for full functionality
- Color scheme and visual elements required several fixes
Discoveries:

- Property is significantly undervalued (€532k savings for buyer)
- Strong demand from 150K+ international employees in Geneva area
- iOS Chrome mobile requires specific optimizations

## Challenges & Blockers

- iOS Chrome compatibility issues with JavaScript and CSS
- Visual rendering problems (black and white display)
- Multiple deployment iterations needed for functionality

## Open Questions

- Exact construction year and charges confirmation needed
- Timeline for implementing recommended sales strategy
- Priority order for contacting identified agencies

## Next Steps

- Contact CAGI Bourse du Logement for immediate listing
- Approach BARNES Suisse for luxury market positioning
- Reach out to GEM for multinational employee access
- Use deployed website for professional property presentation
---
